scripts.deploy:check: npm run assets:generate && npm run ideas:check && npm run i18n:check && npm run app:check && npm run build
scripts.deploy:today: npm run launch:check && npm run payment:doctor && npm run deploy:doctor
scripts.deploy:vercel: npm run launch:check && npx vercel@latest deploy --prod --yes
scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run launch:check && npx netlify-cli@latest deploy --prod --dir=dist --functions=netlify/functions
scripts.native:build: npm run native:sync && npm run native:assets && npm run native:compliance
scripts.native:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.android:debug: npm run native:build && cd android && JAVA_HOME="${DATEHEART_ANDROID_JAVA_HOME:-/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home}" ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:bundle: npm run native:build && cd android && JAVA_HOME="${DATEHEART_ANDROID_JAVA_HOME:-/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home}" ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.ios:build: npm run native:build && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath build/ios CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
